lead_builder_agent.name: Lead Builder Agent
lead_builder_agent.description: Searches the web for Indian traders across all trading segments (Stock, Forex, Commodity, Options & Futures), identifies trader profiles, and collects contact details including WhatsApp numbers, emails, Facebook IDs, and Instagram IDs. Outputs structured lead data.

content_creator_agent.name: Content Creator Agent
content_creator_agent.description: Generates educational, tutorial-style content highlighting the uses and advantages of T4Peace indicators and courses. Produces professional, data-driven scripts and descriptions suitable for Indian trader audiences across all segments.

distribution_agent.name: Distribution Agent
distribution_agent.description: Sends approved video content and educational material to collected leads via email. Also posts content to Twitter for broader social media reach.
